high_concern_flags.detail: Chip-nav references Arizona sibling pages (minimum-wage-and-overtime, workers-compensation, new-hire-reporting, employer-registrations, termination-at-will) that don't exist yet; mirrors the Alabama / Alaska sibling convention. Plain-text rendering used for the United States parent and Arizona state-parent in the links-rail. Note: the existing Arizona sibling (state-income-tax-and-unemployment-insurance) uses 'paid-leave-and-pto/' in its chip-nav rather than 'paid-family-and-sick-leave/'; retrofit that sibling's chip-nav slug when next touched.

The carry-over mechanic in ARS 23-372 reads as 'may be carried over to the following year subject to the annual cap' — different vendor sources disagree on whether the cap then refers to the year-1 total or the year-2 entitlement. Page reflects the cleaner annual-cap = annual-entitlement reading and notes that employers may front-load to decline carry-over (also permitted by statute). Worth confirming with counsel for high-headcount Arizona employers.
Joanna Castens (Chief Legal Officer) pullquote attribution; /team/joanna-castens/ bio + Person schema not yet shipped. Retrofit Person schema link when bio publishes.
